summary:
The retromandibular transparotid approach is noted only as an existing surgical technique without any direct evaluation of outcomes or advantages for condylar fractures. Due to absence of evidence demonstrating superior results compared to standard methods such as intraoral or pre-auricular approaches—which prioritize safe neural preservation and accurate joint alignment—it cannot be considered reliably effective.

---

---. Answer choice: B
